summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve adoption and outcomes—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {coord|implementations} for 20+ programs—scoping outcomes, building project plans, and overseeing delivery with {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams}
Establish {coord|cross-functional processes} and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Drive {change|adoption} of a new sales process by interviewing users to find friction, then building a one-pager landing page that lifted usage
Facilitate {cross|discovery sessions} with 25 global {cross|stakeholders} to refine program positioning and value proposition, launching 3 new programs
Optimized {coord|onboarding} processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership {change|change-management} initiative for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Delivered strategic solutions for business priorities across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Strengthened {cross|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed strategy
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved outcomes via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects spanning survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Developed proficiency across HR functions, from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and {cross|customer service}, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
As a team of consultants, ran discovery workshops and stakeholder interviews to diagnose absenteeism drivers for an HR client
Audited 300+ leave cases to quantify $362K in costs, refuting assumptions and driving policy redesigns and first aid training

changeLog: 2026-05-31: Tailored for Brex — Enterprise Implementation Consultant. Broad umbrella title 'Strategic Program Manager.' Location → New York, NY (role's primary office). Reframed InGenius around implementation: scoping outcomes, project plans, overseeing delivery, plus the 'build with the user' adoption story (real STAR) for change management. Vestas leads with onboarding/process optimization + Inclusive Leadership as change-mgmt. ODN reframed as discovery workshops + diagnosis (consulting/advisory framing), kept collective. Skills lead with CRM/HubSpot (customer-facing). Counts fixed (InGenius/Vestas/NextGen/Kronos=4, ODN=2).
